sections.heading: Front Sheet
paragraphs: This boundary fixture introduces an explicit Word-authored page break between sections so the maintained lane can prove that it still emits stable block anchors and final bundle output without pretending that pageless DOCX has trustworthy page-linked provenance.

sections.heading: Second Sheet
paragraphs: The section after the manual page break remains reviewable in the final DOCX bundle, but the break itself is still an observed authoring signal rather than a maintained open-original page contract.
bullets: Observed: final HTML and provenance artifacts still build cleanly.
Not yet claimed: page-level provenance derived from DOCX page breaks alone.
